title: Create Blueprint
description: Not Another Create Mod Modpack, Aero in Testing!
body:
![The Logo of the Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0f9f19da904de9661edf86a60510a71ebabe1e2.png)
[![Available on Modrinth](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_46h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bpcreate)
[![Watch me on Youtube](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/compact/social/youtube-singular_46h.png?raw=true)](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC5F8ulfmzf264c9XONHQFEw)
[![Built with Neoforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d50ee493e8a61661098f42e8f94b4af682220efa.png)](https://neoforged.net)
## Overview

I, like many other people, kept getting recommended modpacks claiming to provide "The Ultimate Create Experience" like it was the next big thing when in reality, it was just a collection of every mod on the respective mod hosting site with "Create" in the name.

This modpack aims to fix this. Mods and addons are chosen carefully, and are usually heavily modified in order to better suit the modpacks goal. A complete list of all the major changes is below, but to keep it brief, if you dislike vertical item vaults, you're going to like this modpack.


## Showcase
Here is a wonderful video by Mysda that shows off all of the features added in the newest Create Mod update! ([Subscribe](https://www.youtube.com/@Mysda_) to them if you haven't already)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tz5maMNgWqE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Pack Features

- ⚙️Create Mod 6
- 🍒Cherry-Picked Create Addons
- 🍗Farmer's Delight
- ☀️Built-in Shaders
- 🧭Axiom
- 🎒All new update content!
- 💻CC:Tweaked
- 🧩KubeJS (Custom Recipes!)

## Server Installation
Blueprint can be installed on your minecraft server! Install the `mrpack-install` package on your server and add it to your `/usr/local/bin` directory. From there, navigate to where you want your server to be stored and run `mrpack-install bpcreate` to have the server version directly installed to your drive.

## Issue Reporting
Should you encounter any issues while playing, please let me know. The issue tracker can be found on the sidebar. I will get back to you as soon as I can!
